revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Not]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Not]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: hopefully last batch of imports
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Not]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Not]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

<math>\neg</math><noinclude>
{{documentation|content=

{{Distinguish|Template:Not to be confused with}}

==Usage==
[[Negation]]

==See also==
{{Logic symbol templates}}

[[Category:Logic symbol templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
